transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Patricia Hall. I'm calling because my shutoff valve has no hot water. Dispatcher: Hi Patricia, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Rinnai, pretty new, 2 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 9 Lakeview Drive. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out tomorrow between 8 and 10 AM. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.issue: shutoff valve has no hot water
expected_entities.equipment: Rinnai shutoff valve, pretty new, 2 years
